name: ner
description: Extract all named entities from the text. For each entity, identify whether it is a person, place, or organization. Use the exact text from the source — do not paraphrase.

examples.text: Shakespeare was born in Stratford-upon-Avon in 1564. He later joined the Lord Chamberlain's Men, a theatre company based in London.
In 1851, Herman Melville published Moby-Dick through Harper & Brothers in New York.
